title: HAVING filters too late => division by zero
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_div0 ( a INT, b DOUBLE, c VARCHAR(50) );
SELECT MIN(a2) AS a3, SUM(b2) AS b3 FROM ( SELECT a AS a2, SUM(b) AS b2 FROM test_div0 GROUP BY a HAVING SUM(b) > 0 ) AS Sub WHERE b2 / NULLIF(b2, 0) < 0 GROUP BY a2;
key_bug_features: HAVING clause applied before division operation
